title: Change Management in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger change management in practice judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Change Management in Practice is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Change Management in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good change management in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Change Management in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
